title: Otis (OTIS) Q4 Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates, Backlog Solid
text: Solid operational improvement and a lower share count boost Otis Worldwide's (OTIS) Q4 earnings.

title: Otis Worldwide Corporation (OTIS) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE:OTIS ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Michael Rednor – Senior Director-Investor Relations Judy Marks – Chief Executive Officer and President Anurag Maheshwari – Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Julian Mitchell – Barclays Nick Housden – RBC Capital Markets Nigel Coe – Wolfe Research Steve Tusa – JPMorgan Miguel Borrega – Exane BNP Paribas Operator Good morning, and welcome to Otis' Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. This call is being carried live on the Internet and recorded for replay.

title: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Beats Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Otis Worldwide (OTIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.74% and 3.77%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Otis Worldwide Q4 profit and sales top estimates, offers upbeat guidance for 2023
text: Otis Worldwide Corp. OTIS, +1.57% posted stronger-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday, despite macro challenges it says are pressuring its business. The elevator and escalator manufacturer posted net income of $297 million, or 71 cents a share, for the quarter, up from $281 million, or 65 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.
